# VFXRun.com

> VFXRun is a free local 2D VFX browser for previewing PNG sequences, GIFs, and sprite sheets before importing them into Godot, Unity, or other engines. SheetGen is a free browser-based sprite sheet generator by VFXRun.

## Products

- VFXRun Browser: Free desktop app for browsing and previewing local VFX sequences. https://vfxrun.com/
- SheetGen: Free web tool for packing PNG sequences into sprite sheets. https://vfxrun.com/sheetgen

## Key pages

- VFXRun Browser (home): https://vfxrun.com/
- Download: https://vfxrun.com/#download (legacy: https://vfxrun.com/vfxrun/download)
- Pro plan (wishlist votes, not sold yet): https://vfxrun.com/vfxrun/pro#features (legacy wishlist hash: https://vfxrun.com/vfxrun/pro#wishlist; homepage section: https://vfxrun.com/#pro)
- SheetGen: https://vfxrun.com/sheetgen
- Documentation: https://vfxrun.com/docs
- Privacy: https://vfxrun.com/privacy
- Terms: https://vfxrun.com/terms
- Feedback: https://vfxrun.com/feedback

## Privacy

Local files stay on the user's device. VFXRun does not upload file names, file paths, image content, or project assets. Anonymous usage statistics may be collected to improve the product.

## Audience

2D game developers using Godot, Unity, Cocos, or similar engines who work with PNG sequence VFX and sprite sheets.

## Contact

Feedback: https://vfxrun.com/feedback
